summary: A clip of footage from a congressional hearing. A man with gray hair and eyeglasses in a dark suit speaks into a microphone at a witness table, with a printed name placard in front of him and several people seated behind him. The footage stays on the witness as he testifies.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks at a hearing witness table behind a name placard, people seated behind him.
The witness continues speaking into the table microphone.
The witness looks down at notes while continuing to speak at the table.
